name: Black Magic Cake
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease and flour two 9-inch round baking pans or one 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
In a large bowl, stir together sugar, flour, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Add eggs, buttermilk, coffee, oil, and vanilla; beat on medium speed of an electric mixer for 2 minutes (batter will be thin). Pour batter into prepared pans. Bake 30 to 35 minutes for round pans, 35 to 40 minutes for rectangular pan or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool 10 minutes; remove from pans to wire racks. Cool completely. Frost as desired. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
To make sour milk: Use 1 tablespoon white vinegar plus milk to equal 1 cup.
